compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
# op-cert deploy blockers (Dockerfile.opcert + nginx guard map)

## Reproduction Steps
1. Run the 76d2 box deploy on the Gerrit host (compose-up / `docker compose up -d --build opcert` + nginx render of rebar.conf.template).

## Expected
The opcert container builds and the nginx /opcert/ route loads.

## Actual
- Docker build fails: `ssh-keygen -V` (validity-interval flag) errors -> empty version -> 'ERROR: OpenSSH >= 8.9 is required'.
- nginx -t fails: 'could not build map_hash, you should increase map_hash_bucket_size: 64' (48-char guard token overflows default bucket).
(Deploy fail-safe worked: nginx rolled back, Gerrit unaffected.)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] infra/compose/Dockerfile.opcert reads the OpenSSH version from `ssh -V` (not `ssh-keygen -V`); a test asserts this.
- [ ] infra/nginx/rebar.conf.template sets `map_hash_bucket_size` before the guard map; a test asserts this.
- [ ] [operator-attested] the box deploy succeeds after the fix: opcert container up, nginx /opcert/ route loads, Gerrit unaffected.
compiled_state.title: op-cert deploy blockers: Dockerfile.opcert OpenSSH version check + nginx guard map_hash_bucket_size
